name: Ginkotsu
description:
These wolf-like Ginkotsu live in the forest between the Wind Village and the Fire Village.
They are the best hunters in the forest. They always attack adventurers and passersby in the forest.

name: Byakko
description:
Many years ago, an escaped ninja attempted to use a Kinjutsu to merge his body with the summon monster 'Byakko' to gain immortality.
He failed. 'Byakko' devoured him - it is a violent and cruel monster.

name: Aka Tengu
description:
Kojima used Kinjutsu to turn dead bodies into these zombie Tengu.
These Tengu can recall and use all jutsu they learned when they were alive. Only the summoner may control them.

name: Ao Tengu
description:
Kojima used Kinjutsu to turn dead bodies into these zombie Tengu.
These Tengu can recall and use all jutsu they learned when they were alive. Only the summoner may control them.

name: Shikigami YanKi
description:
Summoned by Kojima. Kojima ordered Yanki to protect Kojima's Third Laboratory.
Yanki will not allow anyone to enter the laboratory.

name: Gedo Sessho Seki
description: Summoned by Kojima, Gedo Sessho Seki is the guardian of his Third Laboratory

name: Ape King
description: Living in the Ape Mountain, Ape King is the leader of all apes.

name: Battle Turtle
description: Originated from the north, the Battle Turtle is known of its age, which is signified by the thorns on its shell.

name: Soul General Mutoh
description: Once dead, but resurrected with (Kinjutsu: Reverse Soul Resurrection), Soul General is now a rank-SS criminal who escaped to the Samu Village and serve as a secret weapon.

name: Kari Mori
description: This masked beast, with body like a human but ears like rabbit is a fierce egg thief! The two katana is its signature and it is known of a master of slashing in the world of beasts!

name: Soft Claw
description: Soft Claw is another rabbit that has evolved into a human shape beast. It is good at stealing not only eggs but also weapons!

name: Shi To
description: Shi To is probably a mixture of a rabbit and a lion. Shi To’s attacks are fierce and could hurt a lot!

name: Fire Village Ninja
description: Battle with a ninja who comes from fire village

name: Fire Village Ninja
description: Battle with a ninja who comes from fire village

description: Battle with a ninja who comes from wind village

description: Battle with a ninja who comes from wind village

name: Wild Rainbow Bird
description: It is a very rare species which can manipulate light to distract enemies.

name: Animal Realm
description: HP will not deduct when any sub-boss still survive

name: Asura Realm
description: Ignore the damage and effect of all Genjutsu

name: Rage Asura Realm
description: Ignore the damage and effect of all Genjutsu

name: Preta Realm
description: Ignore the damage and effect of all Ninjutsu

name: Kamaitachi
description: Many unwary travellers fell victim to this slicing menace. At first they thought, 'It's just a breeze,' then comes the slaughter.

name: Hell Horse
description: Only few dared to face this blazing mare. The path it leaves are the ashes of its victims.

name: Kabutomushi Musha
description: Known for its adamantine shell, no one has ever managed to leave a dent on it.

name: Kinkaku
description: They’re the strongest generals of the “Demon Army”. Kinkaku and Ginkaku specializes in razing fortified defenses to create a path for Army.

name: Ginkaku
description: They’re the strongest generals of the “Demon Army”. Kinkaku and Ginkaku specializes in razing fortified defenses to create a path for Army.

name: Thunder Eagle
description: An ancient being that has the power to command lightning on its will.

name: Mammoth King
description: A prehistoric creature that has absorbed large amounts of “Underworld Essence”, which enabled it to evolve and survive through the ages.

name: Oceans Queen
description: Possessed by the cursed trident, the “Ocean Queen” wreaks havoc to any vessel who dares cross its domain.

name: Ghost Soldier
description: Once a noble warrior, it was consumed by malice. Now, it leaves destruction in its wake.

name: Battle Angel
description: A combat angel who has lost its purpose. Driven by its conviction, it continues to slay anyone who cross its path.

name: Infernal Chimera
description: An archdemon who consumed its own kind to become more powerful. The king of hell ordered it to oversee the “Hell’s Gate”.

name: Minotaur
description: Minotaur's Head, Minotaur's Right Arm, Minotaur's Left Arm

name: Minotaur's Head, Minotaur's Right Arm, Minotaur's Left Arm

name: Cerberus
description: Cerberus's Head, Cerberus's Right Hand, Cerberus's Left Hand

name: Griffin
description: Griffin's Head, Griffin's Right Hand, Griffin's Left Hand

name: Moon Princess
description: The Princess come from the Moon. She has a Magical Eye. It can see though everyone's mind and erosion their willpower, make them feel hopeless finally.

name: Demon General
description: Demon General is the owner of immortal power. He got thousands of demon soldiers who have enough power against a whole ninja village.

name: The Mother of Ghosts
description: The Father and the Mother of Ghosts, all ghosts take orders with them. It is said that they are both human before, but one day, their children got stolen. Then, Their sadness and anger turn them to be strong ghosts. All humans are their enemies.

name: The Father of Ghosts
description: The Father and the Mother of Ghosts, all ghosts take orders with them. It is said that they are both human before, but one day their children got stolen. Then, Their sadness and anger turn them to be strong ghosts. All humans are their enemies.

name: Wanyudo
description: Wanyudo's Head, Wanyudo's Right Hand, Wanyudo's Left Hand

name: Gashadokuro
description: Gashadokuro Head, Gashadokuro Right Hand, Gashadokuro Left Hand

name: Necromaster
description: Once a powerful mage, the Necromaster continued the study of Dark Arts to the extent that it started to transcend life and death.

name: Death
description: Death is death itself. Are you prepared?

name: Gashadokuro
description: Gashadokuro Head, Gashadokuro Right Hand, Gashadokuro Left Hand
